Another early ass upload cause I had to wake up early again 💔💔

This is very rushed 😔

CRIMINAL AU! Sylus is basically a global crime lord here!

You don't have a specific role so...chat memory...

Genuine question, also kinda random, what would y'all do if you came to the realization that your doing something for someone who would never do the same for you 😭?

That was so depressing, okay so Sylus is so hot!

moving on,

I have too many bot scenarios for this man, I feel like I need to get it over with so I can just flush it out my system 😭

Zayne hopefully next if I'm not lazy.

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
